response.justification: Bogdan is a capable generalist engineer with roughly 14–16 years of broad experience, but the role demands demonstrated, recognized AI expertise at a director-level strategic scope. His AI-related work (MCP tooling, agentic workflows) began only in April 2025 and lacks the depth, scale, or external recognition the role requires; there is no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping AI platform direction, or building AI-powered products at meaningful scale.
strengths: Broad cross-domain engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and active open-source contributor
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (~1 year) with no demonstrated products or platforms built with AI at scale
No advanced degree in AI or ML, and no publications, patents, or industry recognition in the AI space
No evidence of strategic advisory, executive stakeholder engagement, or director-level IC scope
